status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description:
[Federation] Improve FederationClientInterceptor#ThreadPool thread pool configuration.

1. Increase the thread pool core thread configuration and maximum thread configuration
2. Abandon the original thread pool configuration parameters, the original parameters control the maximum number of threads and core threads at the same time
3. Increase the thread KeepAliveTime configuration.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
